title: FTS integrity-check malfunctions for transaction and the prefix option
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION my_config ( COPY = pg_catalog.english );
CREATE TABLE vt1 (c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM vt1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL AND c2 > 0;
key_bug_features: FTS integrity-check with prefix option causes malformed database error
